outlook.summary: Bearish structure with extreme put skew (PCR 4.01 monthly, skew ratio 1.70). Massive PUT resonance at 630-640 creates structural floor. Max Pain cluster 650-664 forms magnetic zone below spot. 0DTE stability masks underlying volatility risk from weekly/monthly negative gamma. High probability of mean reversion toward Max Pain levels.

Monthly Max Pain above spot. Structural attraction for longer timeframe. Balanced OI zone.

outlook.summary: Market trapped in dealer pinning zone. Total GEX positive at 1.59B indicates dealers long gamma, suppressing volatility. Bearish skew (1.63) and elevated PCR (1.78) reflect hedging demand, but structural support prevails. Max Pain convergence at 581-590 creates magnetic attraction. Watch 590 ceiling and 580 floor for directional breaks.

CONFLUENCE: Strong PUT support across all expiries. Monthly: 32723 PUT OI. 0DTE: 15980 PUT OI. Near Max Pain creates magnetic zone. Primary intraday floor.

CONFLUENCE: Weekly + Monthly resistance. Monthly: 38155 CALL OI, 36455 PUT OI. Secondary ceiling above 590 breakout scenario.
Near spot (587.89). Massive 0DTE volume: 222K PUT vol + 35K CALL vol. High friction battleground zone. Gamma scalping activity.
Weekly Gamma Flip above spot. Marks gamma regime transition. Dealers flip from long to short gamma here, increasing volatility if breached.

outlook.summary: Market in positive gamma regime with spot above all gamma flips (Total GEX: 3.77B). Major RESONANCE at 24300 creates structural pivot. Monthly Max Pain at 24000 aligns with PUT CONFLUENCE providing downside magnet. Bearish skew (1.82 ratio) indicates hedging demand but positive GEX dominates price action. Expect mean reversion between 24000-24400 zone.

levels.motivazione: CALL OI significant in ALL 3 expiries: 0DTE 72 OI with explosive 1468 VOL (ratio 20.4x), Weekly 207 OI, Monthly 404 OI. Highest probability structural level with dealer hedging activity.
PUT WALL across all 3 expiries (0DTE 124 OI/1068 VOL, Weekly 47 OI, Monthly 524 OI). CONFLUENCE with Monthly Max Pain 24000 creates powerful magnet effect. Primary downside target.
MASSIVE Monthly OI: 3998 contracts - largest single strike concentration. Creates heavy resistance zone just below spot. Dealer short gamma hedging required above.
Monthly gamma equilibrium where cumulative GEX changes sign. Spot (24342) is 1.1% above this pivot. Critical level for directional bias - below triggers dealer selling.
CALL OI confluence in all 3 expiries (0DTE 152 OI/1289 VOL, Weekly 211 OI, Monthly 87 OI). Immediate resistance above spot with high intraday volume activity.
Complex structure: PUT 129 OI/971 VOL (0DTE) + CALL 543 OI highest Weekly OI. High volume friction zone creates accumulation area.
Primary 0DTE CALL WALL with 213 OI. Key upside resistance for intraday momentum plays. Break above targets 25000 zone.
PUT OI confluence in 0DTE (71 OI/242 VOL) and Weekly (208 OI). Deep structural floor with bearish skew validation (1.82 ratio).
